About Us

Bridging Global Brands
with China's IP System

Tuyue Trademark Registration is a specialized trademark consultancy helping international businesses protect their intellectual property in global brands registering trademarks in China.

Our Mission

Making China IP Accessible

China's trademark system operates on a first-to-file basis, meaning the first entity to register a trademark owns it — regardless of prior use elsewhere. This creates unique challenges for international brands.

Our mission is to demystify this process. We combine deep knowledge of Chinese IP law with clear, English-language communication to give our clients confidence at every step.

4+

Years of Experience

Since January 2022

5+

Trademarks Registered

Across multiple countries

100%

Success Rate

On trademark applications

Why Choose Us

Built for International Clients

English-First Communication

All reports, updates, and consultations in clear English. No translation gaps, no misunderstandings.

Transparent Pricing

Fixed-fee packages with no hidden costs. You know exactly what you pay before we start.

Licensed CNIPA Agents

Our team holds official CNIPA registration, enabling direct filing without intermediaries.

Our Team

The People Behind Your Brand Protection

A lean, cross-border team with deep knowledge of both international business and China's trademark system.

B

Benny

Client Relations & Strategy

Hong Kong-born, now based in the UK. Benny bridges the gap between international brands and China's trademark system. Fluent in Cantonese, Mandarin, and English, he works directly with clients to understand their brand protection needs and translate them into actionable filing strategies.

Cantonese Mandarin English UK-Based
Y

Yan Huo

China Operations & Supplier Liaison

Based in Shanghai, Yan Huo is the on-the-ground connection to China's trademark ecosystem. She coordinates directly with CNIPA-licensed agents, manages the filing process end-to-end, and ensures every registration meets local regulatory requirements. Her deep network of trusted suppliers keeps turnaround tight and quality high.

Mandarin English Shanghai-Based

As a lean consultancy, we partner with a vetted network of CNIPA-licensed agents and local specialists — giving you enterprise-level coverage without the overhead.
